A hydraulic turbine is the device which turns kinetic energy of water into circumrotation power energy, and makes dynamotor working, then transfer energy to other place.
The circumrotation of roller in metal spinning forming is a important dynamic boundary condition. The speed of roller need to be determine in real time in the process of finite element analysis.
